title: Referred publications 2014–15
description: You may need to refer to some of these publications and rulings to prepare your 2014–15 tax return.
keywords: Publication, Publication, Rulings and determinations, TaxPack, Tax return, TaxTime

content_blocks.text: To help you complete your 2015 tax return, we have provided a list of other publications that will help you to understand your tax obligations and complete your tax return. Some publications are essential to complete some items.

items: 2015 standard distribution statement: guidance notes for fund managers
Application for refund of franking credits for individuals 2015
Capital gains tax concessions for small business 2015
Claiming primary production accelerated depreciation in your 2015 income tax return
Family trust election, revocation or variation 2015
Franking account tax return and instructions 2015
Guide to foreign income tax offset rules 2014–15
Interest on early payments and overpayments of tax 2015
Personal investors guide to capital gains tax 2014–15
Refund of franking credit instructions and application for individuals 2014–15
Research and development tax incentive schedule 2015
Research and development tax incentive schedule instructions 2015
Self-managed superannuation fund annual return instructions 2015
Strata title body corporate tax return and instructions 2015
Timor Sea Treaty – Joint Petroleum Development Area instructions 2014–15
Venture capital deficit tax return and explanatory notes

content_text:
To help you complete your 2015 tax return, we have provided a list of other publications that will help you to understand your tax obligations and complete your tax return. Some publications are essential to complete some items.
## Popular publications
- Individual tax return instructions
- Information for specific occupations
## Publications
- 2015 standard distribution statement: guidance notes for fund managers
